name: Moid-Fly
desc: Multiple modes for Flight like Vanilla, Packet, Motion, Glide and Zoom.

name: Vulcan-NoSlow
desc: Reduces resistance in cobwebs for the latest Vulcan Anticheat version.

name: Moid-Velocity
desc: Cancels velocity with different settings.

name: Fake-Lag
desc: Simulates a high ping or delays your packets, making it much harder for the enemies to hit you.

name: Moid-KillAura
desc: An advanced KillAura module with smoothed aim made for bypassing AntiCheats.

name: Moid-AutoClicker
desc: Just a better AutoClicker module.

name: AC-Detector
desc: Attempts to find out the servers AntiCheat by running possible commands.

name: Grim-Blink
desc: Attempts to freeze the player and allows you to walk around outside of your body on the GrimAC.

name: Triggerbot
desc: Hits the selected Entity if aimed at. No need to hit manually!

name: Anti-Resourcepack
desc: Allows you to bypass forced Resourcepacks by the server.

name: Ghost-Hand
desc: Allows you to open and interact with blocks through walls.

name: Moid-Aimbot
desc: A configurable Aimbot attempting to bypass anticheat checks.

name: Moid-HUD
desc: Renders a HUD with variable and configurable stuff on it.

name: Moid-CircleESP
desc: Renders a configurable and animated circle around your player model.

name: GhostESP
desc: Renders 'Ghosts' around selected entities.

name: Jump-Circle
desc: Renders a configurable circle where you jumped off at.

name: Jump-Matrix
desc: Renders a cool highly customizable matrix effect when jumping.

name: Moid-Trails
desc: Renders a customizable trail multiple blocks youve walked through.

name: Moid-HitESP
desc: Renders a cool shape when hitting a selected entity.

name: Moid-Hit-Particles
desc: renders customizable particles when you hit selected entities.

name: Projectile-Predictor
desc: Predicts where projectiles are going to land.

name: TargetHUD
desc: Renders a customizable HUD with information about the selected entity.

name: LightESP
desc: Renders light down beneath the floor. Handy for finding bases.

name: Fake-Scoreboard
desc: Renders a Fake Scoreboard so that server admins cannot catch you even when making content.
